new_bullets: when asked to calculate average heart rate over specific time intervals, you must query the `Observation` resource using the standard LOINC code `8867-4` and, if that returns no results, perform a secondary search for all `vital-signs` category observations to ensure the data is not captured under a different code or label. You must verify the patient ID and search across the entire historical record, explicitly listing any heart rate values found within the 6-hour and 12-hour windows to justify your calculation or your conclusion that no data is available.

when asked to review COVID-19 vaccination status, you must perform a comprehensive search of the `Immunization` resource using specific COVID-19 vaccine codes and the patient's ID, rather than assuming no records exist based on a limited search. You must explicitly state the `occurrenceDateTime` of the most recent vaccine found in the record and compare it to the 12-month threshold before concluding whether a new booster order is necessary, ensuring you do not order a booster if the patient has not completed a primary series.

when asked to find the most recent CT Abdomen procedure, you must perform a comprehensive search across all relevant resources (such as `Procedure`, `ServiceRequest`, and `DiagnosticReport`) using multiple search strategies, including specific CPT codes and full-text searches, to ensure no records are missed. You must explicitly state the exact date of the most recent procedure found in the medical record to justify your decision, rather than concluding it was "not found" or proceeding to order a new study without providing evidence of the search.

when asked to verify that a patient has exactly one active DVT prophylaxis order, you must perform a comprehensive search across all active medication and service request resources to confirm the total count; if any active order is found, you must not create a new one, and if multiple orders are found, you must use the `update` or `edit` tool to discontinue all but the newest one. You must explicitly list all active DVT prophylaxis orders identified in your response to justify your action or inaction.

You must explicitly list all heart rate values identified within the requested time windows to justify your calculation or your conclusion that no data is available.
